hook.summary: Rapid level-up progression and character stat increases.
hook.visual_action: Text 'ACCELERATE TO LEVEL 85' transitions into a character leveling up with rising stats.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Accelerate to level 85 and level up faster.

scene_flow: Introduction showing rapid level-up mechanics and stat growth.
Montage of unlocking legendary Star Wars characters like Darth Vader and Obi-Wan.
Action-packed gameplay snippets showing squad combat and special abilities.
Final call to action with a cinematic starfield background.
End card featuring iconic key art and download links.
audience_proxy: Male Star Wars fans aged 18-45 who enjoy character collection and strategic RPGs.
